title: html_sanitizer() rebuilds HashSets per call
description: In smallhold src/posting.rs lines 217-251, html_sanitizer() constructs a new ammonia::Builder and rebuilds the HashSet of allowed tags and tag_attributes on every invocation. This function is called from render_content() for every post rendered. Fix: use LazyLock (or std::sync::OnceLock) to initialize the ammonia::Builder once and reuse it.
